sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: FCV Dender are struggling, with no wins in their last 5 matches (1 draw, 4 losses) and only 2 goals scored. RAAL La Louvière, on the other hand, have shown better form with 3 wins in their last 5 matches, scoring 7 goals. This indicates a significant disparity in attacking output and confidence.

sections.subtitle: Defensive Vulnerabilities
sections.text: Dender have conceded 13 goals in their last 5 matches, highlighting defensive frailties. RAAL La Louvière have conceded 9 goals in the same period but have managed to keep tighter games, including a clean sheet. Dender's tendency to concede first (7/8 matches) could be exploited by La Louvière.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Dender rank last in goals scored (2) and have a poor big chance conversion rate (0%), while La Louvière have scored 7 goals with better late-game scoring efficiency (44% of goals after 76 minutes). La Louvière also have more points (10 vs. 2) and a higher league position (12th vs. 16th), reflecting overall better performance.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Insight
sections.text: There are no recent head-to-head matches provided for analysis, so the prediction relies on form and season stats. Historically, in their last 5 matchups, La Louvière have a slight edge with 1 win.

sections.subtitle: Game Statistics Trends
sections.text: Both teams tend to have matches with fewer than 10.5 corners (Dender 9/9, La Louvière 7/8) and fewer than 4.5 cards (Dender 6/7, La Louvière 8/10). This suggests a game with moderate physicality and limited set-piece opportunities.
